title: OSF Machine SM Profile — next/ (SHIM -> profile-schema.json) — v2.0
description: SHIM. The machine/equipment/business meta-schemas were unified into ONE next/validation/profile-schema.json keyed on the (now-required) 'category'. This file is kept (same $id) so consumers that load by filename keep working; it just $refs the unified schema. A machine profile must additionally set category:'machine' — enforced by the unified schema's if/then branch. Validate machine profiles by registering profile-schema.json + constraint-schema.json alongside this shim.
